name: csv-uploader
title: Fuse CsvUploader
description: Fuse-canon drag-drop CSV uploader. Parses via papaparse with header: true so rows come back as { column → value } maps. transformHeader: h.trim() prevents trailing-space columns from failing exact-match field mapping downstream. Brand tokens: drag-active uses border-primary + bg-[var(--ai-tint)]/40 (HR 2 no semantic green); idle uses border-border + bg-muted/30; error in text-destructive. Bounded by ENRICHMENT_CONFIG.MAX_ROWS (consumer-set ceiling; defaults to 100,000 per V-close 2.0.11 PR #705 founder DM bundle). Sentence-case copy per HR 4. Drops fully-empty rows (Excel-export artifact) + filters columns to non-empty trimmed headers. Source: fuse-web components/csv/csv-uploader.tsx + V-close 2.0.11 PR #705 (MAX_ROWS bump).
